choose.when: INSERT INTO app_conversation (id, user_id, character_id, title) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{characterId}, #{title})
choose.otherwise: INSERT INTO app_conversation (user_id, character_id, title) VALUES (#{userId}, #{characterId}, #{title})

mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, character_id, title, created_at, updated_at FROM app_conversation WHERE id = #{conversationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, character_id, title, created_at, updated_at FROM app_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.character_id AS characterId, c.title AS title, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, ch.name AS characterName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ch.avatar_url), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(ch.cover_url), ''), ch.st_avatar_url) AS characterAvatarUrl, ch.description AS characterDescription, m.role AS lastMessageRole, m.content AS lastMessageContent, m.created_at AS lastMessageAt FROM app_conversation c JOIN app_character ch ON ch.id = c.character_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) AS last_msg_id FROM app_message WHERE status IN ('SUCCESS', 'STOPPED') AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY conversation_id ) lm ON lm.conversation_id = c.id LEFT JOIN app_message m ON m.id = lm.last_msg_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND ( (ch.private_card = 1 AND ch.owner_user_id = #{userId}) OR ( ch.private_card = 0 AND ch.owner_user_id IS NULL AND ch.client_visible = 1 AND COALESCE(NULLIF(ch.review_status, ''), 'APPROVED') = 'APPROVED' ) ) AND lm.last_msg_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.character_id AS characterId, c.title AS title, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, ch.name AS characterName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ch.avatar_url), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(ch.cover_url), ''), ch.st_avatar_url) AS characterAvatarUrl, ch.description AS characterDescription, m.role AS lastMessageRole, m.content AS lastMessageContent, m.created_at AS lastMessageAt FROM app_conversation c JOIN app_character ch ON ch.id = c.character_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) AS last_msg_id FROM app_message WHERE status IN ('SUCCESS', 'STOPPED') AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY conversation_id ) lm ON lm.conversation_id = c.id LEFT JOIN app_message m ON m.id = lm.last_msg_id LEFT JOIN app_conversation_archive a ON a.user_id = c.user_id AND a.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND ( (ch.private_card = 1 AND ch.owner_user_id = #{userId}) OR ( ch.private_card = 0 AND ch.owner_user_id IS NULL AND ch.client_visible = 1 AND COALESCE(NULLIF(ch.review_status, ''), 'APPROVED') = 'APPROVED' ) ) AND a.id IS NULL AND lm.last_msg_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE app_conversation SET title = #{title}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{conversationId} AND (title IS NULL OR title = '')

UPDATE app_conversation SET title = (SELECT name FROM app_character WHERE id = app_conversation.character_id), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{conversationId} AND (title IS NULL OR title = '')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_conversation c LEFT JOIN app_conversation_archive a ON a.user_id = c.user_id AND a.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND a.id IS NULL
